text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
And now, for the face of the past four seasons!
Our Umamusume of the Year...

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Holding a firm grip on the lead, she astounded us
with a number of spectacular getaways. Everyone,
give it up for Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Taiki Shuttle wasn't able to
achieve her dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her overwhelming power and speed have
certainly captivated the hearts of many fans as
the fastest sprinter around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first three years together have passed by,
just like that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for being so tardy! By the time I realized it,
my feet were takin' me to the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was so sure I'd get Umamusume of the Year this
time around, but I guess I went overboard with
everything!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, our time together has flown right by. Just
as fast as me down the track!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have accomplished so much. My
family's pleased as punch too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Were you happy bein' by my side, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yay! I was hoping you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I might not've become Umamusume of the Year
yet, but I ain't finished trying!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on runnin' and making people
happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything, Trainer! I'm lookin' forward
to what the future's got in store for us!
